cards.front: What is a Forest in Machine Learning?
cards.back: An ensemble learning method that combines multiple weak models to create a strong predictive model
A weak base classifier used in AdaBoost to improve the accuracy of the ensemble model
A subset bagging technique used in Bagging where a random subset of the training data is used to train a subset of the base classifiers
An ensemble learning method that combines multiple decision trees to create a strong predictive model

cards.front: What is Bagging in Machine Learning?
cards.back: A technique that involves creating multiple models using different subsets of the training data to improve the accuracy of the ensemble model
